sentences.arabic: أَقَامَتِ الْمَدْرَسَةُ حَفْلًا لِتَكْرِيمِ الطُّلَّابِ الْمُتَمَيِّزِينَ.
sentences.translation: Škola je priredila svečanost za nagrađivanje odličnih učenika.
sentences.translationEn: The school held a ceremony to honor the outstanding students.

sentences.translation: Prisustvovali su roditelji, nastavnici i gradski zvaničnici.
sentences.translationEn: Parents, teachers, and city officials attended.

sentences.arabic: نَالَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ مُتَمَيِّزٍ شَهَادَةً وَهَدِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Svaki odličan učenik je dobio diplomu i poklon.
sentences.translationEn: Every outstanding student received a certificate and a gift.

sentences.translation: Dan je bio ispunjen srećom i ponosom.
sentences.translationEn: The day was filled with happiness and pride.
